• Web-based MIDI audio player with Tone.js and MidiPlayer.js integration
  • Features library selection from JSON atlases and custom file upload support
  • Complete playback controls with play, pause, and restart functionality
    const sampler = new Tone.Sampler({ urls: { C4: url } }).toDestination();
    player = new MidiPlayer.Player((event) => { if (event.name === 'Note on') sampler.triggerAttackRelease(event.noteName, "4n"); });

MIDIbeat is a browser-based audio application that synchronizes MIDI sequences with custom audio samples. Users can select from predefined libraries or upload their own files, with Tone.js handling audio synthesis and MidiPlayer.js managing MIDI playback events.
